prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a brooding Tokyo private detective standing on a wet rooftop at sunset, framed from mid-thigh upward in a 9:16 composition. He is a Japanese man in his early-to-mid 30s with medium-length messy black hair, light stubble, tired intense eyes, and a serious noir expression, looking directly at the camera with both hands in his trouser pockets. Outfit: exactly 5 main visible clothing/accessory pieces — a wrinkled pale gray button-up dress shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, a loosened dark tie, black shoulder holster straps, brown high-waisted pleated trousers, and a dark belt. The setting is a gritty urban Tokyo skyline after rain, with reflective puddles on the rooftop floor, a metal guardrail, dense city buildings with lit windows and neon signs below, and exactly 1 large rooftop billboard on the right reading 「東京探偵事務所」. Use dramatic golden-orange sunset light breaking through dark storm clouds, strong rim lighting around the hair and shoulders, deep shadows on the face, moody high-contrast color grading, realistic film photography, subtle rain-slick textures, 35mm cinematic lens feel, shallow depth of field, detailed skin and fabric, no extra characters, no modern sci-fi elements, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a brooding Tokyo private detective standing on a wet rooftop at sunset, framed from mid-thigh upward in a 9:16 composition. He is a Japanese man in his early-to-mid 30s with medium-length messy black hair, light stubble, tired intense eyes, and a serious noir expression, looking directly at the camera with both hands in his trouser pockets. Outfit: exactly 5 main visible clothing/accessory pieces — a wrinkled pale gray button-up dress shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, a loosened dark tie, black shoulder holster straps, brown high-waisted pleated trousers, and a dark belt. The setting is a gritty urban Tokyo skyline after rain, with reflective puddles on the rooftop floor, a metal guardrail, dense city buildings with lit windows and neon signs below, and exactly 1 large rooftop billboard on the right reading 「東京探偵事務所」. Use dramatic golden-orange sunset light breaking through dark storm clouds, strong rim lighting around the hair and shoulders, deep shadows on the face, moody high-contrast color grading, realistic film photography, subtle rain-slick textures, 35mm cinematic lens feel, shallow depth of field, detailed skin and fabric, no extra characters, no modern sci-fi elements, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影级的竖构图肖像，主角是 日本私家侦探，他正站在日落时分东京雨后湿漉漉的天台上。他是一位外表粗犷的东亚成年男性，留着凌乱的中长黑发，下巴有细碎的胡茬，表情严肃且疲惫，姿态自信而略显慵懒，正注视着镜头。他穿着一件褶皱的浅灰色衬衫，袖子卷至前臂，领带松开，佩戴黑色肩部枪套，系着棕色皮带，穿着高腰棕色褶皱长裤；双手插在口袋里。背景是一个充满颗粒感的城市天台，地面是潮湿且带有反光的混凝土，配有金属栏杆、黑暗的建筑剪影、远处的霓虹灯，以及右侧一块写有 東京探偵事務所 的大型风化天台广告牌。天空呈现出戏剧性的暴风雨前兆，厚重的云层被地平线附近低垂的橙色太阳逆光照射，营造出金色的边缘光、深邃的阴影和忧郁的黑色电影氛围。使用写实细节、高动态范围、电影级调色、浅景深、逼真的皮肤纹理、潮湿织物的高光、大气雾霾，以及 35mm 电影剧照的质感。竖构图 9:16，全身至四分之三景别，主体略微偏左居中，低角度透视，无额外角色，无水印，无现代奇幻元素。
